Pipeline (Wan 2.1 queue + enhancer + HF).docstring_first_line: WAN 2.1 24/7 PAUSABLE QUEUE — the perfect pipeline.
Pipeline (Wan 2.1 queue + enhancer + HF).docstring_short:
WAN 2.1 24/7 PAUSABLE QUEUE — the perfect pipeline.

Design principles ("perfect once = perfect forever"):
  - Runs FOREVER by default. No max-hours nonsense.
  - PAUSABLE via flag file. Drop F:/scalelistuniverse/PAUSE.flag and the
    queue finishes its current clip (or abandons it) and then waits, checking
    every 15 seconds. Delete the flag → it resumes. Pause for 2 hours, 2 days,
    2 weeks

Pipeline (Wan 2.1 queue + enhancer + HF).docstring_short:

Pipeline (Wan 2.1 queue + enhancer + HF).docstring_short:
WAN 2.1 CPU ENHANCER — runs in parallel with the GPU queue.

Watches F:/scalelistuniverse/QA_REVIEW/wan21_queue/{char}/*.webp for new clips,
and for each new one:
  1. Extracts frames via Pillow (CPU)
  2. Upscales 2x with Lanczos (CPU, much faster than APISR, still sharp)
  3. Re-encodes with FFmpeg at higher bitrate and minterpolate 12 → 30 fps (CPU)
  4. Saves to wan21_queue_enhanced/{char}/{sa
